signupDate.description: Date and time when the user signed up. May be space-separated (non-RFC3339).

signupSource.description: Source through which the user signed up.

profileUpdatedAt.description: Date and time when the profile was last updated. May be space-separated (non-RFC3339).

emailListIds.description: List of email list IDs the user is subscribed to.

subscribedMessageTypeIds.description: List of message type IDs the user has subscribed to.

unsubscribedMessageTypeIds.description: List of message type IDs the user has unsubscribed from.

unsubscribedChannelIds.description: List of channel IDs the user has unsubscribed from.

phoneNumberCarrier.description: Carrier associated with the user's phone number.

phoneNumberCountryPrefix.description: Country prefix for the user's phone number.

phoneNumberIsVoip.description: Whether the user's phone number is a VoIP number.

phoneNumberLineType.description: Line type of the user's phone number.

phoneNumberUpdatedAt.description: Date and time when the phone number was last updated.

itblInternal.emailDomain.description: Domain of the user's email address (set by Iterable internally).

itblInternal.documentCreatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user document was created internally.

itblInternal.documentUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user document was last updated internally.

itblInternal.isUnknownUser.description: Whether the user is flagged as unknown by Iterable.

data.description: Custom data fields specific to the tenant. Contains all non-standard user profile fields.
